ground_truth.title: Attention Is All You Need
ground_truth.abstract_summary: We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.
key_claims: The Transformer model outperforms recurrent or convolutional models in translation quality.
Training requires significantly less time than traditional architectures.
methods: We used the Transformer architecture with multi-head self-attention.

ground_truth.title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
ground_truth.abstract_summary: We propose Low-Rank Adaptation, or LoRA, which freezes the pre-trained model weights and injects trainable rank decomposition matrices into each layer of the Transformer architecture
key_claims: LoRA reduces the number of trainable parameters by 10000 times.
Performance is comparable or superior to full fine-tuning.
methods: We parameterize the weight updates by representing them as product of two low-rank matrices.

ground_truth.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
ground_truth.abstract_summary: We introduce Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) models, which combine pre-trained parametric memory with non-parametric memory (retrieved Wikipedia documents)
key_claims: RAG models produce more factual, specific, and diverse responses than parametric-only models.
In-context retrieval improves answer accuracy on open-domain QA.
methods: We combine a dense passage retriever (DPR) with a sequence-to-sequence generator (BART).
